svg.text: ECO-SIM: Maned Wolf × Wolf Apple - Endozoochory Clock
Seed dispersal via gut passage: Chrysocyon brachyurus ↔ Solanum lycocarpum

g.text: Fruit peaks raise wolf frugivory and route fidelity.
Reused latrines turn patrol paths into seed-rain nodes.
Gut passage moves seeds away from parent crowns.
Recruitment succeeds once post-fire soils get moisture.
Green circles = established recruits after dispersal
